name: LiPo Battery 2000mAh (804050 / 103450)

dimensions.note: Dimensions vary significantly by manufacturer -- verify before PCB design

estimatedKeyboardLife.assumptions: Based on ~1mA average BLE keyboard idle draw, 4-6 hours active use per day

summary: Maximum life (~3 months BLE) — may not fit thin cases
designNotes: Large capacity -- best for non-split or unibody keyboards with LEDs
Too large for most slim split keyboard halves -- measure case dimensions
Charge at 0.5C max (1000mA) -- requires dedicated charger IC, not nice!nano's 100mA
At 100mA charge rate from nice!nano, full charge takes ~24+ hours -- impractical
Use BQ24075 or TP4056 with appropriate PROG resistor for reasonable charge times
Significant weight -- will make keyboard noticeably heavier
Best suited for unibody designs or travel keyboards that need long battery life
JST PH polarity varies by manufacturer -- ALWAYS verify before connecting
features: Maximum capacity for extended battery life
Best for unibody or non-split keyboards
concerns: Too large for most slim split keyboard halves
Impractical to charge via nice!nano (24+ hours from empty)
Requires dedicated charger IC (BQ24075 or TP4056)
JST PH polarity varies by manufacturer
